string.text: How fast the PDA journey bar moves when lightly loaded (white inventory weight). Yellow weight (-20%% speed) and red weight (-50%% speed) slow you further. Sneaking is about 3x slower. Too encumbered to walk blocks walk/sneak travel; guides still work.
How long travel notifications stay on screen (seconds).

Ambushes: dodge chance is Sneaking skill + sneak mode only (sneak doubles, 95%% cap). Visibility scan = time base (day 50 m, dawn/dusk 40 m, night 30 m) minus weather (best only: rain -10 m, storm -15 m, fog -20 m; 10 m floor). If spotted, you are dropped short and must fight. Guides cannot be ambushed. Cannot start with enemies within 50 m.
Guide travel (instant jump to a base on another map): Easy 2000 RU/km, Medium 2500 RU/km, Hard 3000 RU/km.
Write extra travel details to the game log.
Show the route on the PDA when you right-click a destination, before you start travelling. Off by default.
Development keybind: increase Sneaking skill level by 1.
Development keybind: decrease Sneaking skill level by 1.
